name: Wild Mushroom Pumpkin Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried porcini and shiitake mushrooms in hot water for 20 minutes.
2. Chop the rehydrated mushrooms and set aside the soaking liquid.
3. Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add chopped onion and sauté until translucent.
4. Add sliced fresh mushrooms and the soaking liquid to the pot, along with vegetable stock.
5. Stir in pumpkin, nutmeg, salt (or tamari), and black pepper. Bring to a simmer.
6. Cook for about 20-25 minutes or until all ingredients are heated through.
7. Adjust seasoning if needed. Garnish with parsley and chives before serving.
